code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> Initializing: Component mounted

    Initializing --> Loading: Subscribe to DMs
    Loading --> Empty: No messages
    Loading --> ThreadList: Messages loaded
    Loading --> Error: Subscription failed

    Empty --> ThreadList: First message received

    ThreadList --> ThreadSelected: User selects thread
    ThreadSelected --> ThreadList: Back to list
    ThreadSelected --> Composing: User types message

    Composing --> Encrypting: User sends
    Encrypting --> Publishing: Encryption complete
    Publishing --> ThreadSelected: Publish success
    Publishing --> Error: Publish failed

    ThreadSelected --> MarkingRead: Auto-mark as read
    MarkingRead --> ThreadSelected: Update complete

    ThreadList --> Refreshing: Pull to refresh
    Refreshing --> ThreadList: Refresh complete

    ThreadSelected --> Deleting: User deletes thread
    Deleting --> ThreadList: Delete complete

    Error --> ThreadList: Retry success
    Error --> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]: Fatal error

    note right of Encrypting
        NIP04Service encrypts
        message using recipient's
        public key
    end note

    note right of Publishing
        EventPublisherService
        publishes kind 4 event
        to relays
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网场景设计一个设备消息管理的状态机。核心是一个TelemetryStream组件，它挂载后要先初始化，然后订阅DMS服务获取消息。
明白了，初始化之后进入Loading状态。那如果订阅失败怎么办？还有，如果当前没有消息，应该有个空状态吧？
对，Loading之后分三条路：订阅失败进Error，没有消息进Empty，正常加载完成就显示ThreadList。Empty状态收到第一条消息后要能自动转到ThreadList。
好的，主列表和空状态我画好了。接下来用户交互部分呢？选中消息、返回这些流程怎么设计？
用户选中某个thread进入ThreadSelected状态，可以返回列表。关键的发送流程是：用户输入时进入Composing，点击发送后先Encrypting加密，用的是NIP04Service和接收方公钥，然后Publishing发布到中继。
加密和发布我加上注释说明。Publishing之后成功就回到ThreadSelected，失败呢？
发布失败也进Error状态。另外ThreadSelected还要支持自动标记已读，以及用户主动删除thread。列表页支持下拉刷新。
都加上了。Error状态的处理我再确认下：普通错误可以重试成功回到ThreadList，但如果遇到致命错误要转到ActuatorController？
没错，Fatal error时把控制权交给ActuatorController做降级处理。这样整个状态流转就完整了。
